requirement_topic.en: BOBS Compulsory Conformity & BOS Import Inspection / Mark — Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: BOBS强制符合性与BOS进口检验/标志——电冰箱
requirement_topic.zht: BOBS強制符合性與BOS進口檢驗/標誌——電冰箱

summary.en: Botswana does not use a single CE-style mark. Market access for regulated products is governed by the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) under the Standards Act, which administers compulsory Botswana Standards (BOS) and an import-inspection / conformity scheme with a BOS mark for products under compulsory specification. For a household refrigerator, demonstrating conformity means: assembling test evidence to the adopted BOS/IEC standards (electrical safety to IEC 60335-2-24, EMC to CISPR 14 where applicable, energy to IEC 62552 where a MEPS/label applies), obtaining BOBS conformity assessment / a BOS mark or import clearance, and ensuring rating-plate/marking suit 230 V 50 Hz with English instructions. Because there is no single mark covering everything, the exporter must satisfy each applicable BOS standard and the import-inspection requirement, then clear through the importer.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳不使用单一的CE式标志。受监管产品的市场准入由博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）依《标准法》管理，BOBS负责强制性博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）及进口检验/符合性制度，对属于强制规范的产品施加BOS标志。对家用电冰箱而言，证明符合性意味着：依采用的BOS/IEC标准整理检测证据（电气安全依IEC 60335-2-24、电磁兼容在适用时依CISPR 14、能效在MEPS/标签适用时依IEC 62552），取得BOBS合格评定/BOS标志或进口放行，并确保铭牌/标识适配230 V 50 Hz并配英语说明书。由于没有覆盖一切的单一标志，出口商须满足每项适用的BOS标准及进口检验要求，再经进口商放行。
summary.zht: 波札那不使用單一的CE式標誌。受監管產品的市場准入由波札那標準局（BOBS）依《標準法》管理，BOBS負責強制性波札那標準（BOS）及進口檢驗/符合性制度，對屬於強制規範的產品施加BOS標誌。對家用電冰箱而言，證明符合性意味著：依採用的BOS/IEC標準整理檢測證據（電氣安全依IEC 60335-2-24、電磁相容在適用時依CISPR 14、能效在MEPS/標籤適用時依IEC 62552），取得BOBS合格評定/BOS標誌或進口放行，並確保銘牌/標識適配230 V 50 Hz並配英語說明書。由於沒有覆蓋一切的單一標誌，出口商須滿足每項適用的BOS標準及進口檢驗要求，再經進口商放行。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Botswana) — BOBS mandate for compulsory Botswana Standards (BOS) and import inspection
BOS import-inspection / conformity scheme and BOS mark — for products under compulsory specification
BOS / IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), BOS / CISPR 14 (EMC where applicable), BOS / IEC 62552 (energy where MEPS/label applies)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus separate China Energy Label compliance (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification by CNCA-designated bodies — not a self-declaration. There is no single CE-equivalent mark; CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy, issued and displayed separately. CCC and CEL are domestic-market instruments and are not automatically recognised by BOBS, though the underlying GB standards share their IEC/CISPR roots with the BOS-adopted standards.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另行符合中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定机构办理的强制性第三方认证——非自我声明。中国无单一等同CE的标志；CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，分别颁发和展示。CCC与CEL为国内市场工具，不被BOBS自动认可，但其底层GB标准与BOS采用标准共享IEC/CISPR渊源。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另行符合中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定機構辦理的強制性第三方認證——非自我聲明。中國無單一等同CE的標誌；CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，分別頒發和展示。CCC與CEL為國內市場工具，不被BOBS自動認可，但其底層GB標準與BOS採用標準共享IEC/CISPR淵源。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese CCC and CEL do not substitute for the Botswana route, but the shared IEC/CISPR heritage helps. Gaps: (1) Recognition — a CCC certificate is not the BOBS basis; conformity must be shown via BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import-inspection, typically using IEC/CB or accredited-laboratory reports against the BOS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14 / IEC 62552; (2) Per-standard demonstration — because there is no single mark, each applicable BOS standard plus the import-inspection requirement must be satisfied separately; (3) Localisation — 230 V 50 Hz rating-plate, English instructions, refrigerant type/charge marking, and importer details; (4) Scope confirmation — the exporter must confirm whether the refrigerator is under a current BOBS compulsory specification and whether a BOS mark / import permit is required. An IECEE CB report is usually the most efficient evidence to bridge from Chinese testing to the BOS requirement.
gap.zh: 中国CCC与CEL不能替代博茨瓦纳途径，但共同的IEC/CISPR渊源有所帮助。差距：（1）认可——CCC证书不构成BOBS基础；须通过BOBS合格评定/BOS进口检验证明符合性，通常采用IEC/CB或认可实验室报告，对照BOS采用的IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552；（2）逐标准证明——因无单一标志，每项适用的BOS标准加进口检验要求须分别满足；（3）本地化——230 V 50 Hz铭牌、英语说明书、制冷剂类型/充注量标识及进口商信息；（4）范围确认——出口商须确认电冰箱是否属于当前BOBS强制规范，以及是否需要BOS标志/进口许可。IECEE CB报告通常是从中国检测衔接至BOS要求的最有效证据。
gap.zht: 中國CCC與CEL不能替代波札那途徑，但共同的IEC/CISPR淵源有所幫助。差距：（1）認可——CCC證書不構成BOBS基礎；須通過BOBS合格評定/BOS進口檢驗證明符合性，通常採用IEC/CB或認可實驗室報告，對照BOS採用的IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552；（2）逐標準證明——因無單一標誌，每項適用的BOS標準加進口檢驗要求須分別滿足；（3）本地化——230 V 50 Hz銘牌、英語說明書、製冷劑類型/充注量標識及進口商資訊；（4）範圍確認——出口商須確認電冰箱是否屬於當前BOBS強制規範，以及是否需要BOS標誌/進口許可。IECEE CB報告通常是從中國檢測銜接至BOS要求的最有效證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the refrigerator falls under a BOBS compulsory specification — BOS import-inspection / mark and conformity to adopted BOS standards required before clearance and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana market access runs through BOBS compulsory standards and the BOS import-inspection / mark scheme, not a single CE-style mark. Chinese CCC and CEL are not recognised directly, but the shared IEC/CISPR base (best presented via an IECEE CB report) bridges most testing. Each applicable BOS standard plus import inspection must be satisfied, with 230 V marking, English instructions, and importer details. Confirm compulsory scope and BOS-mark/import-permit requirements with BOBS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳市场准入通过BOBS强制标准及BOS进口检验/标志制度，而非单一CE式标志。中国CCC与CEL不被直接认可，但共同的IEC/CISPR基础（最好经IECEE CB报告呈现）可衔接多数检测。每项适用的BOS标准加进口检验须满足，并配230 V标识、英语说明书及进口商信息。请向BOBS确认强制范围及BOS标志/进口许可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那市場准入通過BOBS強制標準及BOS進口檢驗/標誌制度，而非單一CE式標誌。中國CCC與CEL不被直接認可，但共同的IEC/CISPR基礎（最好經IECEE CB報告呈現）可銜接多數檢測。每項適用的BOS標準加進口檢驗須滿足，並配230 V標識、英語說明書及進口商資訊。請向BOBS確認強制範圍及BOS標誌/進口許可要求。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer & Logistics — Landlocked Routing via Durban / Walvis Bay (Botswana)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商与物流——经德班/鲸湾港的内陆国转运（博茨瓦纳）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商與物流——經德班/鯨灣港的內陸國轉運（波札那）

summary.en: Botswana is landlocked, so refrigerators from China arrive by sea at a regional port — most commonly Durban (South Africa) or Walvis Bay (Namibia) — then move overland into Botswana. Market access in practice requires an in-country importer (a Botswana-established entity) who handles import clearance, presents conformity evidence to the BOS import-inspection scheme, obtains any required BOBS import permit / clearance, and is the responsible party for the goods locally. The importer's details typically appear on the product or accompanying documentation. Customs/duty treatment runs through SACU (Southern African Customs Union, which includes Botswana). There is no statutory EU-style 'authorised representative' construct; the practical responsible economic operator is the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳为内陆国，故来自中国的电冰箱经海运抵达区域港口——最常见为德班（南非）或鲸湾港（纳米比亚）——再陆运进入博茨瓦纳。实务上的市场准入需要本地进口商（在博茨瓦纳设立的实体），其负责进口清关、向BOS进口检验制度提交符合性证据、取得所需的BOBS进口许可/放行，并为货物在本地承担责任。进口商信息通常出现在产品或随附文件上。海关/关税处理经SACU（南部非洲关税同盟，含博茨瓦纳）。无法定的欧盟式"授权代表"构造；实务上的责任经济运营商即本地进口商。
summary.zht: 波札那為內陸國，故來自中國的電冰箱經海運抵達區域港口——最常見為德班（南非）或鯨灣港（納米比亞）——再陸運進入波札那。實務上的市場准入需要本地進口商（在波札那設立的實體），其負責進口清關、向BOS進口檢驗制度提交符合性證據、取得所需的BOBS進口許可/放行，並為貨物在本地承擔責任。進口商資訊通常出現在產品或隨附文件上。海關/關稅處理經SACU（南部非洲關稅同盟，含波札那）。無法定的歐盟式「授權代表」構造；實務上的責任經濟運營商即本地進口商。

standards_or_laws: Botswana in-country importer requirement — import clearance and responsibility for goods under the BOS import-inspection scheme
Regional port routing — Durban (South Africa) / Walvis Bay (Namibia) sea entry, then overland into landlocked Botswana
SACU (Southern African Customs Union) — customs/duty framework covering Botswana

summary.en: China has no regulatory construct requiring an export manufacturer to designate a foreign-country responsible representative; export sales are arranged commercially with overseas distributors or trading companies. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market only, and that role does not extend to or satisfy Botswana import-clearance, BOS import-inspection, or in-country importer responsibility. The exporter must arrange a Botswana importer and the regional logistics route independently.
summary.zh: 中国无监管构造要求出口制造商指定目的国责任代表；出口销售以商业方式与海外经销商或贸易公司安排。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人仅为中国市场的责任方，该角色不延伸至博茨瓦纳进口清关、BOS进口检验或本地进口商责任，亦不能满足之。出口商须独立安排博茨瓦纳进口商及区域物流路线。
summary.zht: 中國無監管構造要求出口製造商指定目的國責任代表；出口銷售以商業方式與海外經銷商或貿易公司安排。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人僅為中國市場的責任方，該角色不延伸至波札那進口清關、BOS進口檢驗或本地進口商責任，亦不能滿足之。出口商須獨立安排波札那進口商及區域物流路線。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring designation of a foreign in-country importer/representative

gap.en: Practical, structural gaps rather than a standards gap: (1) In-country importer — a Botswana-established importer must be in place to clear goods, present conformity evidence to BOS import inspection, and carry local responsibility; without one the goods cannot practically enter the market; (2) Landlocked routing — goods must be planned via Durban or Walvis Bay with overland transit, adding lead time, cross-border (SACU) handling, and cold-chain-irrelevant-but-handling-sensitive logistics for bulky appliances; (3) Import permit / inspection — any BOBS import permit or BOS import-inspection clearance must be obtained before or at importation; (4) No EU-AR analogue — there is no separate statutory 'authorised representative' to appoint as in the EU; the importer is the de-facto responsible economic operator. Note: Botswana does NOT impose an EU-style horizontal regime (no RoHS, no battery directive, no outdoor-noise directive) on refrigerators, so those EU-only obligations are not part of the Botswana gap.
gap.zh: 属实务性、结构性差距而非标准差距：（1）本地进口商——须有在博茨瓦纳设立的进口商清关、向BOS进口检验提交符合性证据并承担本地责任；无此则货物实务上无法进入市场；（2）内陆国转运——货物须经德班或鲸湾港规划并陆运转运，增加交付周期、跨境（SACU）处理及对大件器具敏感的搬运物流；（3）进口许可/检验——任何BOBS进口许可或BOS进口检验放行须在进口前或进口时取得；（4）无欧盟AR对应——不像欧盟那样另设法定"授权代表"须委任；进口商即事实上的责任经济运营商。注：博茨瓦纳不对电冰箱施加欧盟式横向制度（无RoHS、无电池指令、无户外噪声指令），故该等欧盟特有义务不属博茨瓦纳差距。
gap.zht: 屬實務性、結構性差距而非標準差距：（1）本地進口商——須有在波札那設立的進口商清關、向BOS進口檢驗提交符合性證據並承擔本地責任；無此則貨物實務上無法進入市場；（2）內陸國轉運——貨物須經德班或鯨灣港規劃並陸運轉運，增加交付週期、跨境（SACU）處理及對大件器具敏感的搬運物流；（3）進口許可/檢驗——任何BOBS進口許可或BOS進口檢驗放行須在進口前或進口時取得；（4）無歐盟AR對應——不像歐盟那樣另設法定「授權代表」須委任；進口商即事實上的責任經濟運營商。註：波札那不對電冰箱施加歐盟式橫向制度（無RoHS、無電池指令、無戶外噪聲指令），故該等歐盟特有義務不屬波札那差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer and import clearance (with any BOBS import permit / BOS inspection) are required to place goods on the Botswana market; landlocked routing via Durban / Walvis Bay. No statutory EU-style authorised-representative construct
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign in-country importer/representative under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana is landlocked, so an in-country importer plus regional routing via Durban or Walvis Bay is required, with BOS import-inspection clearance (and any BOBS import permit) before goods enter the market. There is no EU-style authorised-representative construct — the importer is the responsible operator. Botswana imposes no EU-style horizontal RoHS/battery/outdoor-noise regime on refrigerators. Confirm import-permit and inspection specifics with BOBS and a Botswana customs/importer partner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳为内陆国，故需本地进口商加经德班或鲸湾港的区域转运，并在货物入市前取得BOS进口检验放行（及任何BOBS进口许可）。无欧盟式授权代表构造——进口商即责任运营商。博茨瓦纳不对电冰箱施加欧盟式横向RoHS/电池/户外噪声制度。请向BOBS及博茨瓦纳海关/进口商伙伴确认进口许可及检验细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那為內陸國，故需本地進口商加經德班或鯨灣港的區域轉運，並在貨物入市前取得BOS進口檢驗放行（及任何BOBS進口許可）。無歐盟式授權代表構造——進口商即責任運營商。波札那不對電冰箱施加歐盟式橫向RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲制度。請向BOBS及波札那海關/進口商夥伴確認進口許可及檢驗細節。
